channel.title: GitHub Trending Changes
channel.description: Track changes in GitHub trending repositories

item.title: bwya77 / vscode-dark-islands
item.description:
🆕 NEW ENTRY - Ranked #5
VSCode theme based off the easemate IDE and Jetbrains islands theme
Language: PowerShell 665 stars today

item.title: mksglu / context-mode
item.description:
🆕 NEW ENTRY - Ranked #6
Context window optimization for AI coding agents. Sandboxes tool output, 98% reduction. 14 platforms
Language: TypeScript 306 stars today

item.title: jwasham / coding-interview-university
item.description:
🆕 NEW ENTRY - Ranked #9
A complete computer science study plan to become a software engineer. 497 stars today

item.title: Arindam200 / awesome-ai-apps
item.description:
🆕 NEW ENTRY - Ranked #10
A collection of projects showcasing RAG, agents, workflows, and other AI use cases
Language: Python 170 stars today

item.title: LearningCircuit / local-deep-research
item.description:
🆕 NEW ENTRY - Ranked #12
~95% on SimpleQA (e.g. Qwen3.6-27B on a 3090). Supports all local and cloud LLMs (llama.cpp, Ollama, Google, ...). 10+ search engines - arXiv, PubMed, your private documents. Everything Local & Encrypted.
Language: Python 171 stars today

item.title: forrestchang / andrej-karpathy-skills
item.description:
🆕 NEW ENTRY - Ranked #14
A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls. 2,829 stars today

item.title: ruvnet / ruflo
item.description:
📉 Rank: #1 → #2 (↓1) | ⭐ Stars: 41,204 → 42,528 (+1324)
